series_metadata.series_title: Fireworks Manufacturer, Wholesaler, or Out-of-State Shipper Licensing Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains the application, correspondence, annual renewals, facility construction documents, proof of liability insurance, ownership validation, variances, litigation and other support documents required for fireworks companies to be licensed in Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Unless being used in litigation, convert records machine readable format upon creation/receipt of file information/documents and paper copy twenty years associated license year ends. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked quality and completeness and passage of specified time period, paper copy. files subject litigation, maintain longer period of: twenty years end license year or five years end of litigation associated with file. ; Microform: Maintain microfilm converted machine readable format. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked quality and completeness, microfilm. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable format permanently
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
